applications.facilities: Laundry Service, Play Room Access, Cafeteria Food
Laundry Service, Gym Access, Play Room Access, Cafeteria Food
Laundry Service, Gym Access, Play Room Access, Cafeteria Food

facilities_info.title: High-Speed WiFi
facilities_info.description: Uninterrupted internet connectivity 24/7 for all your academic, research, and personal entertainment needs.

facilities_info.title: Laundry Service
facilities_info.description: In-house premium laundry facilities equipped with modern washing machines and dryers for your convenience.

facilities_info.title: 24/7 Security
facilities_info.description: Round-the-clock CCTV surveillance, biometric access gates, and professional guards ensuring utmost safety.

facilities_info.title: Mess Facility
facilities_info.description: Hygienic, purely nutritious, and diverse meals prepared daily in our extremely clean, vast operational kitchens.

facilities_info.title: Study Rooms
facilities_info.description: Quiet, fully air-conditioned spaces dedicated exclusively for focused reading, group discussions, and self-study.

facilities_info.title: Gymnasium
facilities_info.description: A fully equipped modern gym including treadmills, weights, and yoga spaces to keep you fit and healthy.

facilities_info.title: Parking
facilities_info.description: Spacious and secure parking lots designated safely for students' two-wheelers and four-wheeler vehicles.

facilities_info.title: Recreation Area
facilities_info.description: An indoor game zone loaded with table tennis, pool tables, and lounging couches for evening relaxation.

facilities_info.title: Medical Assistance
facilities_info.description: 24/7 on-call doctor availability, an integrated pharmacy, and a first-aid ambulance ready on the premises.
